packageRules.description: Update only the lockfile to the latest in-range version, leaving the declared range in package.json untouched. Example: `"react": "^18.2.0"` locked at 18.2.5 becomes the lockfile at 18.2.6 while package.json still reads `^18.2.0`. This keeps the declared range wide so downstream consumers of our published packages (@kognic/*, @annotell/*) can resolve compatible versions, while we test and pin the latest in-range version via the lockfile. Renovate runs `npm/pnpm/yarn install` (or `bun install`) to refresh the lockfile.
